evals.prompt: I just changed RING_SPACING from 160 to 180 in network_map_svg.py to space nodes further apart. Regenerate the demo SVG so the docs stay in sync.
evals.expected_output: Runs gen_demo_svg.py with uv, lints the script, verifies the SVG output has the right visual features (3 hop rings, 12 nodes, badges, glows), and stages + commits docs/assets/network-map-demo.svg with the correct commit message.
assertions: Runs the script using 'uv run python scripts/gen_demo_svg.py' (not bare python)
Verifies the SVG file exists at docs/assets/network-map-demo.svg after generation
Checks that the SVG contains 3 hop rings or references ring structure
Commits with message matching 'docs(network-map): regenerate demo SVG'

evals.prompt: The network map docs page shows a stale SVG image — it still has the old 2-ring layout. Update docs/assets/network-map-demo.svg to reflect the current rendering code.
evals.expected_output: Identifies and runs the generator script, verifies the output, and commits with the standard message.
assertions: Runs 'uv run python scripts/gen_demo_svg.py' to regenerate
Verifies the SVG was updated (checks file exists, or inspects content)
Does NOT use bare 'python scripts/gen_demo_svg.py' without uv

evals.prompt: I updated the mock topology in gen_demo_svg.py to add a fourth hop ring. Please run the network-map-demo-svg skill to regenerate the docs SVG.
evals.expected_output: Explicitly triggered skill: runs script, lints, verifies, commits.
assertions: Runs the generator script with uv
Commits with the conventional commit message format 'docs(network-map): ...'
